content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: keep_401_boundary
C: grace_window_30s ∧ "401"_on_expiry ∧ normalized_ms
P: "<"_vs_"<="_mismatch ∧ skew_budget_drift
V: edge(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401) ∧ edge(0s_401) ∧ missing_token_401
A: encode_grace_explicit ∧ single_comparison_site ∧ regression_tests_boundary

@flint v0 hybrid
G: keep_401_invariant
C: "<" ∧ "401" ∧ grace_window ∧ ms_normalized
P: off_by_one ∧ "<="_vs_"<" ∧ skew_budget_widened
V: edge_-30s_200 ∧ edge_-31s_401 ∧ exact_threshold_401 ∧ missing_token_401
A: assert_reject_at_expiry ∧ assert_accept_within_grace ∧ assert_reject_just_outside ∧ single_comparison_site

@flint v0 hybrid
G: choose_architecture
C: "6" ∧ "4 months" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ team_deadline ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: modular_monolith ∧ clean_module_seams ∧ stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable ∧ split(post_release)
V: module_boundary_tests ∧ dep_graph_check ∧ schema_ownership_audit ∧ release_cadence_metric
A: adopt_modular_monolith ∧ defer_split ∧ enforce_seams ∧ revisit_post_release

[AUDIT]
Goal: choose_architecture.
Constraints: "6" and "4 months" and "PostgreSQL" and team_deadline and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: modular_monolith and clean_module_seams and stable_apis and no_shared_mutable and split(post_release).
Verify: module_boundary_tests and dep_graph_check and schema_ownership_audit and release_cadence_metric.
Answer target: adopt_modular_monolith and defer_split and enforce_seams and revisit_post_release.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team("6") ∧ deadline("4 months") ∧ low_ops ∧ fast_ship
P: postgres("PostgreSQL") ∧ clean_module_seams ∧ stable_apis ∧ no_shared_mutable
V: defer_split ∧ ship_weekly ∧ minimal_diff
A: split(post_release) ∧ verify_domain_boundaries ∧ risk(coupling_creep)

[AUDIT]
Goal: modular_monolith.
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("4 months") and low ops and fast shipping.
Plan: postgres("PostgreSQL") and clean_module_seams and stable_apis and no_shared_mutable.
Verify: defer_split and ship_weekly and minimal_diff.
Answer target: split(post_release) and verify_domain_boundaries and risk(coupling_creep).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deny_spoof
C: public_edge ∧ "x-user-id" ∧ untrusted ∧ session_authoritative
P: client_sends("x-user-id") ∧ gateway_no_strip ∧ loadUser_trusts_header ∧ impersonation
V: drop_at_gateway("x-user-id") ∧ bind_session.userId_only ∧ missing_session("401") ∧ spoofed_header_denied("401") ∧ cross_user_fetch_denied
A: gateway_strip_hdr ∧ auth_keep("401") ∧ regression_test_spoof ∧ regression_test_missing_session ∧ risk_trusted_proxy_contract_unverified

[AUDIT]
Goal: deny_spoof.
Constraints: public_edge and "x-user-id" and untrusted and session_authoritative.
Plan: client_sends("x-user-id") and gateway_no_strip and loadUser_trusts_header and impersonation.
Verify: drop_at_gateway("x-user-id") and bind_session.userId_only and missing_session("401") and spoofed_header_denied("401") and cross_user_fetch_denied.
Answer target: gateway_strip_hdr and auth_keep("401") and regression_test_spoof and regression_test_missing_session and risk_trusted_proxy_contract_unverified.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review_header_auth
C: untrusted("x-user-id") ∧ public_boundary ∧ session_authoritative
P: header_overrides_identity ∧ spoof_impersonation ∧ horizontal_priv_esc
V: drop("x-user-id") ∧ bind_session.userId ∧ keep("401") ∧ strip_at_gateway
A: spoofed_hdr_denied ∧ missing_session("401") ∧ cross_user_denied ∧ duplicate_hdr_stripped

[AUDIT]
Goal: review_header_auth.
Constraints: untrusted("x-user-id") and public_boundary and session_authoritative.
Plan: header_overrides_identity and spoof_impersonation and horizontal_priv_esc.
Verify: drop("x-user-id") and bind_session.userId and keep("401") and strip_at_gateway.
Answer target: spoofed_hdr_denied and missing_session("401") and cross_user_denied and duplicate_hdr_stripped.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_to_async
C: "next(err)" ∧ callback_legacy ∧ minimal_diff
P: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ same_order ∧ preserve_signature ∧ single_error_site
V: validate→load→branch_not_found→side_effects→respond ∧ no_double_next ∧ this_binding_check
A: wrap_callback_in_promise ∧ await_in_order ∧ route_errors_via_next(err) ∧ test_success ∧ test_validation_fail ∧ test_downstream_error ∧ test_no_duplicate_next

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_to_async.
Constraints: "next(err)" and callback_legacy and minimal_diff.
Plan: "async" and "await" and same validation order and preserve_signature and single_error_site.
Verify: validate then load then branch_not_found then side_effects then respond and no_double_next and this_binding_check.
Answer target: wrap_callback_in_promise and await_in_order and route_errors_via_next(err) and test_success and test_validation_fail and test_downstream_error and test_no_duplicate_next.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_to_async
C: "next(err)" ∧ callback_legacy ∧ same_order ∧ minimal_diff
V: success_path ∧ validation_fail ∧ downstream_error ∧ no_duplicate_next ∧ this_binding_check
A: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ try_catch_to_next ∧ minimal_patch ∧ regression_tests

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_to_async.
Constraints: "next(err)" and callback_legacy and same validation order and minimal_diff.
Verify: success_path and validation_fail and downstream_error and no_duplicate_next and this_binding_check.
Answer target: "async" and "await" and try_catch_to_next and minimal_patch and regression_tests.
